registry_meta.name: South Carolina Jurisdiction Recon Registry
registry_meta.purpose: Pre-onboarding recon. Captures the components that drive onboarding cost/feasibility for SC jurisdictions BEFORE onboarding begins. NOT a jurisdiction config; an entry graduates into jurisdictions/{slug}.json only when actually onboarded. Mirrors the GA registry shape and reuses its field vocabularies (research/ga_recon/METHODOLOGY.md).
registry_meta.generated_by: manual_recon (web search + government-site verification + adversarial refuter pass)

universe.note: Demand-driven Tier-2 recon of the Dorchester County bundle, run AHEAD of SC's full Tier-1 state dossier (states.json SC phases still not_started). Not a state-universe enumeration.
universe.source: U.S. Census / SC Dept. of Education; per-entity sources cited in each entry's verification block.

changelog.change: SC registry created. First batch 'demand_lowcountry': Dorchester County bundle — Dorchester County (Granicus), Dorchester School District Two (BoardDocs), Dorchester School District Four (Diligent Community). Adversarial refuter pass overturned 3 draft absence claims pre-write: county FOIA email (dcfoia@) + clerk email (LConrad@) are published; DD4 has a named FOIA custodian (asanders@dd4.k12.sc.us). DD2 absences (no records-custodian email, in-person-only comment) survived refutation, capped at medium. Field vocabularies reused verbatim from GA registry 0.2.

check-urls liveness audit classified. Dorchester County: official .gov pages return 403 (Cloudflare/Imperva bot wall — fetch_tier:browser; pages exist) and NextRequest returns 204 (JS SPA, no body to non-JS clients) — all real, off-wall Granicus + S3 documents fetch 200. DD2 BoardDocs returns 403 to the throttled civic client but 200 to a browser UA (UA-gated, real). DD2 HARD FAILURE fixed: two search-indexed ddtwo.org FOIA/public-information leaf pages 404 to a browser UA (site restructure) — replaced with live (200) Community-Relations + Board-Policy-KDB URLs and recorded the 404 as a gap. No absence claim rests on a dead URL.

dorchester-county-sc.name: Dorchester County
dorchester-county-sc.records_custodian_name: Dorchester County FOIA Coordinator (County Attorney's Office)
notable_gaps: Official .gov HTML site (dorchestercountysc.gov) is bot-walled — returns HTTP 403 to raw fetching; nav/listing pages need the browser fetch tier. Mitigations: the Granicus agenda/minutes platform (dorchester.granicus.com), the NextRequest FOIA portal, and Granicus S3 document attachments all sit OUTSIDE the wall and fetch normally.
Constitutional officers (Sheriff, Coroner, etc.) run separate records-request pages, not modeled as council bodies.

public_comment.deadline_rule: Citizens addressing agenda items complete the online 'Request to Address Council' form; the Clerk to Council (Lona R. Conrad) administers it. Council meets 1st & 3rd Mondays 6:00 PM (one meeting only in Aug & Dec).
public_comment.notes: Meetings at Willie R. Davis County Council Chambers, 201 Johnston Street, St. George, SC 29477. Live-streamed/archived on Granicus (dorchester.granicus.com) and the Dorchester County Council YouTube channel. Written contact to council also reachable via Clerk LConrad@dorchestercountysc.gov and the 7 published councilmember mailboxes (e.g. PSmith@, DChinnis@, RMRanck@, SFriddle@, ECrosby@, FStaropoli@, JByars2@ dorchestercountysc.gov). The exact Request-to-Address form URL lives behind the bot wall; not captured this session (submit_url left null).

verification.method: web-search structure sweep + search-engine pass + adversarial refuter (reader-proxy used to read the bot-walled .gov FOIA/council pages; Granicus + NextRequest read directly)

queries: Dorchester County South Carolina official website council agendas minutes
Dorchester County SC council meeting video granicus OR swagit OR viebit agenda packet pdf
Dorchester County SC FOIA request records custodian email clerk to council Lona Conrad
"dorchestercountysc.gov" county council public comment sign up speak meeting
Dorchester County SC FOIA Coordinator County Attorney email "@dorchestercountysc.gov" records request

verification.sibling_control: Granicus (dorchester.granicus.com, view_id=1) hosts BOTH Agendas and Minutes for all 9 bodies (County Council + 8 committees) back to 2017 — agenda/minutes coverage parses cleanly; no absence claimed on documents.

adversarial.votes: 1 refuter, both email-absence claims REFUTED — FOIA email dcfoia@dorchestercountysc.gov (mailto on the FOIA page) and Clerk LConrad@dorchestercountysc.gov (council + agendas pages, corroborated by SC Assoc. of Counties live directory) are published in plaintext; entry corrected before write.

dorchester-county-sc.notes: Granicus platform: agendas at dorchester.granicus.com/AgendaViewer.php?view_id=1&event_id=<id>; minutes at /services/minutes/reports/<uuid>/attachment; packet PDFs on granicus_production_attachments.s3.amazonaws.com/dorchester/. Archives to 2017. 9 bodies: County Council + Water & Sewer, Planning Development & Building, Budget Finance & Purchasing, Public Safety Health & Human Services, Public Works Property & Utilities, Agenda & Rules, Administrative & Intergovernmental Affairs, Audit committees. FOIA: Coordinator in County Attorney's Office, mail to 500 N. Main St., Summerville SC 29483, phone 843-563-0100; SC Code 30-4-30(C) response min 10 business days (records <=2yr) / 20 (>2yr); per-page copy fees published. Population 161,540 (2020). DATA CAVEAT: a stale SC Assoc. of Counties clerks PDF lists lconrad@dorchestercounty.sc.gov (wrong domain) / 843-563-0196 — the county's own site domain dorchestercountysc.gov and 843-832-0196 are authoritative.

dorchester-school-district-two-sc.name: Dorchester School District Two
notable_gaps: No plaintext records-custodian/FOIA email is published; FOIA intake is an online FOIA form or a written request mailed to the Public Information Officer at 815 South Main Street, Summerville SC 29483.

SITE RESTRUCTURE: the search-indexed FOIA page (/district/departments/community-engagement/freedom-of-information-act-requests) and the /community-relations/public-information leaf now return HTTP 404 even to a browser UA — DD2 reorganized its Finalsite site and Google has not re-crawled. FOIA procedure is governed by Board Policy KDB (https://boardpolicyonline.com/?b=dorchester); intake is in writing / online FOIA Request Form via the Community Relations department. Locate the current FOIA-form URL at onboarding.
No written/email public-comment channel — board public comment is an in-person sign-in card only.

Email mailbox domain is @dorchester2.k12.sc.us (ddtwo.org is web hosting only). The address jpassmore@dorchester2.k12.sc.us is an UNVERIFIED naming-convention inference — NOT published; do not use as a records channel.

public_comment.deadline_rule: Complete an in-person sign-in card five minutes before the meeting; 3 minutes per speaker; agenda-item comments plus a separate 3-minute general public-comment period at the end of the meeting; chairman's discretion on total time.
public_comment.notes: Board meets 2nd & 4th Mondays 6:00 PM at the DD2 Administrative Offices, 815 South Main Street, Summerville SC 29483; live-streamed at ddtwo.org/live; agendas on BoardDocs. Trustee emails ARE published in plaintext (chair Ashley Wimberly awimberly@dorchester2.k12.sc.us; secretary Justin Farnsworth jufarnsworth@dorchester2.k12.sc.us) but none is presented as a public-comment intake channel. No bot can file written comment of record.

verification.method: web-search structure sweep + search-engine pass + 1 adversarial refuter; live ddtwo.org FOIA/PIO pages intermittently 404 to automated fetchers (Finalsite) — read via search snippets + BoardDocs; BoardDocs UA-gates the throttled civic client (403) but returns 200 to a browser UA — real platform, not dead.

queries: Dorchester School District Two DD2 Summerville SC board of education agendas minutes BoardDocs
Dorchester School District Two ddtwo.org FOIA public records request custodian email public comment board meeting speak
ddtwo.org FOIA "Public Information Officer" email contact Dorchester School District Two records request address
Dorchester School District Two Public Information Officer name "@ddtwo" OR "@dorchester2" email community relations

verification.sibling_control: BoardDocs (go.boarddocs.com/sc/ddtw) hosts BOTH agendas and minutes for the Board of Trustees — document publication is NOT in question. The absence is narrowly the records-custodian email + a written public-comment channel, confirmed by two methods (FOIA page text + search pass), not a mis-navigated section.

adversarial.votes: 1 refuter, both absence claims COULD-NOT-REFUTE (survived) — no published FOIA/PIO email; in-person sign-in card only. Capped entry confidence at medium (single refuter + live FOIA page not directly loadable).

dorchester-school-district-two-sc.notes: Superintendent Chad Daugherty. PIO Jennifer Passmore (named 2024-03-13). Regular meetings 2nd & 4th Mondays 6PM. Wikipedia/Census: largest district in the county (Summerville, Ladson, North Charleston portions). CONSOLIDATION WATCH: SC bills 3154 (2023-24) and 3470 (2025-26) study merging DD2 + DD4; barred without approval by registered electors of each district — track for jurisdiction-structure changes.

dorchester-school-district-four-sc.name: Dorchester School District Four
notable_gaps: No dedicated published FOIA procedure, request form, or fee schedule — FOIA handling is surfaced only as a duty bullet on the Chief HR Officer's page ('Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) Requests: Coordinating requests in accordance with state law'). Intake is the named custodian email asanders@dd4.k12.sc.us or postal mail.
No written/email public-comment channel — public comment is an in-person 'Public Forum' segment at board meetings only; the portal's only 'Sign up' is meeting-notification subscription, not comment.
Migrated agendas/minutes from BoardDocs (2016-2024 archive) to Diligent Community (iCompass).

public_comment.deadline_rule: In-person 'Public Forum' segment during board meetings; no published written/email channel or online sign-up.
public_comment.notes: Board meets monthly (~7:30 PM) at the SGMS Administrative Office Board Room, 600 Minus Street, St. George SC 29477. Board-member emails are published in plaintext (phughes@, tfolk@, jhodges@, einfinger@, vinfinger@, info@dd4.k12.sc.us) but none is presented as a comment-of-record channel.

verification.method: web-search structure sweep + search-engine pass + 1 adversarial refuter (refuter verified custodian/platform/board emails from raw page HTML; main site is Apptegy/Thrillshare and inlines content as escaped JSON that truncates summarizers)

queries: Dorchester School District Four DD4 St. George Harleyville SC board agendas minutes
Dorchester School District Four St George FOIA records request public comment board meeting address public participation
"dorchester4" OR "Dorchester School District Four" St. George SC FOIA freedom of information records request email public comment board policy

verification.sibling_control: Diligent Community portal (dorchester4-k12-sc.community.highbond.com/Portal) lists real dated meetings (e.g. Regular Board Meeting May 19 2026) carrying both Agenda (HTML+PDF) and Minutes documents, plus a 'BoardDocs Archive (2016-2024)' entry — document publication is NOT in question; the absence is only the written public-comment channel.

adversarial.votes: 1 refuter: Claim A (no FOIA custodian email) PARTIALLY REFUTED — named custodian Dr. April Sanders asanders@dd4.k12.sc.us found on HR page (entry corrected to populate it); Claim B (in-person-only comment) COULD-NOT-REFUTE — survived, confirmed by positive 'Public Forum' evidence + notification-only portal sign-up.

dorchester-school-district-four-sc.notes: Superintendent Jeffrey Beckwith (selected 2023-04). Board chair Mrs. Phyllis Hughes. District office 500 Ridge Street, St. George SC 29477; phone 843-563-4535; fax 843-563-9269; general info@dd4.k12.sc.us. Successor district to former Dorchester District 1 + District 3 (consolidated into DD4 by SC Act, 1985-86). Smaller, rural (St. George, Harleyville, Reevesville, Grover; Woodland High). Main website is Apptegy/Thrillshare (org 25123). CONSOLIDATION WATCH: SC bills 3154 (2023-24) and 3470 (2025-26) study merging DD2 + DD4 (voter approval required in each district).
